name: geb
summary: GEB simulates the environment (e.g., hydrology, floods), the individual people, households and orginizations as well as their interactions at both small and large scale.
author: Jens de Bruijn, Maurice Kalthof, Veerle Bril, Lars Tierolf, Tarun Sadana, Elisa Stefaniak, Tim Busker, Rafaella Oliveira, Carolina Carral, Roy Pontman, Lisanne van Amelsvoort, Joshua Kiesel
